race.comment: BIG ROOSTER (1) similarly resumes having been good in two runs to date, in the market both times. Mott booked first up is a good sign, if he can slot in he'll go close. MENZIES CREEK (8) was short odds fresh at Mt Gambier when close up, respecting with that run under the belt. I'M DA BOSS (3) is a two-start maiden who shows promise and looks close to a win, the latest effort a sound fourth over 1100m at Geelong. Can continue to improve. ATOMOVA (9) just found one better before a spell and draws nicely. Placed in a recent Camperdown jump-out. Opened last campaign with a fifth at Warrnambool over 1100m. In the mix.
